content.en:
"There are so many ninth realms, and there are still ninth realms fighting!"

Ye Tian's position was far away from Xuanwu Star, but he could still sense a little bit of Xuanwu Star's situation.

Soon, his gaze was focused on the vine on the Xuanwu Star.

"The !!!!! of the Multidimensional Supreme Thing"

Ye Tiandu gasped.

Only then did he understand why these Ninth Realms had gathered here, it turned out that he had discovered a multi-dimensional supreme thing.

However, except for the Peacock Realm Lord and the Silver Capital Realm Lord who were killing in the palace, the other Ninth Realms did not make a move, and they were also worried that they would be besieged when they approached the Xuanwu Star to take the multi-dimensional supreme thing, in that case, it would be easy to fall into the Xuanwu Star, and if there was no means to break away from the Xuanwu Star, they would definitely die.

An existence like the Peacock Realm Lord is almost dead, how dare the other Ninth Realms!

Soon.

A Ninth Realm persuaded the Peacock Realm Lord to stop fighting and discuss how to distribute the multi-dimensional supreme things.

"What kind of distribution, this multi-dimensional supreme thing is mine!" the Peacock Realm Lord roared angrily.

He was very annoyed, if it weren't for the Silver Capital Realm Lord, he would have taken the multi-dimensional supreme thing and left, and as a result, 893 had attracted so many Ninth Realms now.

However, the most distressed Night Realm Lord stood there and didn't dare to say a word, he was the first Ninth Realm to discover the multi-dimensional supreme thing!

"Peacock Realm Lord, you are not qualified to occupy this multi-dimensional supreme thing!" "The Cover Realm Lord stepped forward and said in a cold voice.

The Peacock Realm Lord stared at the Gai Yin Realm Lord vigilantly, snorted coldly, but did not say anything.

At this time, there were already many, many ninth realms and a few eighth realms here.

If it continues to be delayed, I am afraid that more Ninth Realm will come.

Therefore, at present, it is best to take out the multi-dimensional supreme things first, and then distribute them, otherwise there will be more and more people, and they will be allocated less multidimensional supreme things.

"Peacock Realm Lord, it is impossible for so many Ninth Realms present to give up this multi-dimensional supreme thing, and at present, we are still cooperating with each other to take out this multi-dimensional supreme thing, and then distribute it according to their strength when the time comes. Another Ninth Realm that is no less than the Lord of the Hidden Realm said.

The Peacock Realm Lord said, "This is the Hanging Night Realm Lord's discovery, and he must get the same share as me." "

There is no way, he made an oath with the Lord of the Hanging Night Realm, and if he distributes some multi-dimensional supreme things to the others, he can't take out half of himself to the Lord of the Hanging Night Realm, right?

Therefore, another share must be given, and his share cannot be touched.

"It turned out that the Lord of the Hanging Night Realm discovered that it could indeed give the Lord of the Night Hanging Night Realm the same share. "

In this regard, several top Ninth Realm masters such as the Lord of the Covered Realm had no opinion.

Just as they were planning to take out the multidimensional supreme thing, a voice came.

"Everyone, this multi-dimensional supreme thing, our Void Heaven Palace wants ninety percent!"

As soon as the words fell, a woman walked over, seemingly unremarkable.

However, when all the Ninth Realms saw this woman, their expressions changed drastically, and they all bent down and said respectfully: "I have seen the Lord of the Void Immortal Realm!"

Even the top Ninth Realm such as the Peacock Realm Lord and the Cover Shadow Realm Lord had to bow their heads, which showed the strength of this woman.

Of course.

Those eighth realms and some weak ninth realms were shallow in their knowledge, and they didn't know the Void Immortal Fairy at all, but they didn't dare to look directly at the Void Immortal Realm Lord, and they also bowed their heads.

Wow!

The Lord of the Void Immortal Realm crossed these ninth realms in one step and came to the Xuanwu Star, she seemed to ignore the powerful power of the Xuanwu Star, walked in directly, came to the Xuanwu Star, and dragged out the multi-dimensional supreme thing with one hand.

Seeing this scene, Ye Tian was really shocked.

Obviously, the strength of this Void Immortal Realm Lord is extremely terrifying, far from being comparable to the ordinary Ninth Realm, maybe it is the almost invincible existence in the Ninth Realm?

Then.

The Void Immortal Realm Lord dragged the multi-dimensional supreme thing out of the Xuanwu Star, and then directly separated one-tenth of the multi-dimensional supreme thing.

Just when everyone was looking forward to it, the Void Fairy Fairy smiled slightly, and then directly shattered one-tenth of the multi-dimensional supreme thing, breaking it into countless pieces.

Then, with a wave of her hand, these countless fragments were scattered everywhere, and some even fell into the sixteenth dimension.

"These pieces are for you!"

After saying that, the Void Immortal Realm Lord left, and no Ninth Realm dared to express dissatisfaction.

After the Void Immortal Realm Lord left, they began to snatch it.

Whew!!!

These Ninth Realms rushed towards those fragments, and the Ninth Realm entered the sixteenth dimension.

Ye Tian didn't say a word, and directly left the seventeenth dimension and entered the sixteenth dimension.

......

Sixteenth dimension.

Ye Tian searched for the fragments of the multi-dimensional supreme thing.

It didn't take long for him to find a fragment, but there was also an Eighth Realm coming over.

This Eighth Realm is the cultivation of the peak of the Eighth Realm, and he has created a supreme masterpiece, he thinks that his strength is very strong, and he does not take Ye Tian in his eyes.

"Get out of here!"

This Eighth Realm casually struck at Ye Tian.

However.

Ye Tian crushed the opponent's attack with one hand, and then urged the supreme dimensional domain body, and with just one punch, he directly shattered the opponent's body and killed the opponent in seconds.

"It's too weak!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This kind of Eighth Realm, he didn't even comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dimension, and his body was extremely fragile, so naturally he was far from being his opponent, and he didn't even bother to use the Eight Realms Supreme Absolute Learning.

Wow!

This fragment was acquired by Ye Tian.

Immediately after, Ye Tian's other copy body came over and took this piece of fragment with him, he didn't want to be killed by a top ninth realm here, causing such a multi-dimensional supreme fragment to be taken away.

Subsequently.

He continued to look for that fragment.

After a while, he found another piece.

When Ye Tian found the third fragment, he encountered a powerhouse in the early stage of the Ninth Realm, and seeing that the opponent's strength didn't seem to be too strong, Ye Tian directly took action to cast the Eight Realms Supreme Absolute Skill.

And that ninth realm is the lord of the Takizawa realm.

"The Eighth Realm dares to attack me?"

The Takizawa Realm Lord was a little surprised.

But after Ye Tian's Eight Realms Supreme Peerless Zhou Tian's multi-dimensional painting was displayed, he suddenly looked sideways.

In an instant.

The scene around him changed, and he was included in Zhou Tian's multidimensional paintings.

Immediately, projections of multi-dimensional stars appeared in the void, and the power of three hundred and sixty-five multi-dimensional stars strangled them.

Thundered!!!

The Takizawa Realm Lord fought with the power of these multi-dimensional stars, and after some killing, he forcibly tore Zhou Tian Duowei to draw it, but his body showed a little injury.

He was about to teach Ye Tian a lesson, but found that it was gone, and the fragment of the multi-dimensional supreme thing was gone.
